title: stipa lagascae var. clausa
intro: Stipa lagascae var. clausa, also known as the Spanish needle grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stipa lagascae var. clausa include its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health complaints.
